name: Scene Vibe
author: VERA
description: Instantly sets the cinematic MOOD of the open level for showcase screenshots and demo recordings. set_vibe picks one of 5 cinematic moods (cyberpunk, horror, golden_hour, noir, aztec_dusk) and spawns a tagged DirectionalLight + an unbound PostProcessVolume with curated color grading, exposure, bloom and vignette. clear_vibe removes them, restoring the level. Fully reversible.
